name: Link into the VRAINS!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｉｎｔｏ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イントゥ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ｔｈｅ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＶＲＡＩＮＳ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヴレインズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>！
desc: Special Summon 1 monster from your hand, but negate its effects, then, immediately after this effect resolves, Link Summon 1 Link Monster using monsters you control as material, including that monster. This Link Summon cannot be negated, also your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when a monster is Link Summoned this way. If a Link Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card; add 1 monster from your GY to your hand with the same original Type as 1 of those destroyed monsters. You can only activate 1 "Link into the VRAINS!" per turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 monster from your hand, but negate its effects, then, immediately after this effect resolves, Link Summon 1 Link Monster using monsters you control as material, including that monster. This Link Summon cannot be negated, also your opponent cannot activate cards or effects when a monster is Link Summoned this way. If a Link Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card; add 1 monster from your GY to your hand with the same original Type as 1 of those destroyed monsters. You can only activate 1 "Link into the VRAINS!" per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
